question: उत्तर प्रदेश राज्यातील सर्व पीएसयूंसाठी गाव कोड सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME = 'Uttar Pradesh';

question: उत्तर प्रदेश राज्यात असलेल्या सर्व अद्वितीय पीएसयू गाव कोड्सची संख्यानुसार क्रमवारी लावून यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Uttar Pradesh' GROUP BY T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE ORDER BY T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE

question: उत्तर प्रदेश राज्यातील सर्व अद्वितीय पीएसयू गाव कोडांची क्रमवारीत यादी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Uttar Pradesh' GROUP BY T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE ORDER BY T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE ASC

question: प्रत्येक राज्यातील गावांची संख्या द्या.
sql: SELECT count(T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID), T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME

question: प्रत्येक राज्यासाठी पीएसयू गावांची संख्या द्या.
sql: SELECT count(T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID), T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
गावांच्या एकूण संख्येनुसार राज्यांची क्रमवारी सूची प्रदान करा, ज्यामध्ये कोणत्याही अशा राज्यांचा समावेश नाही ज्यांचा गाव डेटा नोंदवलेला नाही.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) DESC

question: उत्तर प्रदेश राज्यातील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची यादी करा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Uttar Pradesh';

question: उत्तर प्रदेशातील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची वर्णक्रमानुसार यादी द्या ज्यात पीएसयू गावे आहेत.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Uttar Pradesh' ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME

question: उत्तर प्रदेशातील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे सूचीबद्ध करा ज्यात किमान एक पीएसयू गाव आहे, वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Uttar Pradesh' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question:
ही विनंती भाषांतरित करा:
सर्व राज्ये आणि त्यांच्या संबंधित जिल्ह्यांची यादी, राज्य आणि जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावून द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME

question:
या क्वेरीचे भाषांतर करा:
सर्व राज्ये आणि त्यांचे संबंधित जिल्हे यांची यादी, राज्यानुसार वर्णक्रमाने आणि नंतर जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार क्रमवारी लावून प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME

question:
या प्रश्नाचे भाषांतर करा:
सर्व राज्ये आणि त्यांचे संबंधित जिल्हे यांची यादी द्या, राज्यानुसार वर्णक्रमाने आणि नंतर जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID IN (SELECT STATE_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT GROUP BY STATE_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTRICT_ID) > 0) ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: कोणत्या दहा जिल्ह्यांमध्ये पीएसयू गावांची संख्या सर्वाधिक आहे?
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) DESC LIMIT 10;

question: कोणत्या दहा जिल्ह्यांमध्ये सर्वाधिक संख्येने पीएसयू गावे आहेत?
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) DESC LIMIT 10

question: सोनीपत, हिसार, लुधियाना, सुलतानपूर आणि भोपाळ या जिल्ह्यांसाठी, पहिल्या सर्वेक्षणात भाग घेतलेल्या अद्वितीय गावांच्या संख्येनुसार शीर्ष 10 जिल्ह्यांची रँकिंग करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) AS PSU_COUNT FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.BIRTH_EVENT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('Sonipat', 'Hissar', 'Ludhiana', 'Sultanpur', 'Bhopal') AND T3.SURVEY_ID = 1 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY PSU_COUNT DESC LIMIT 10

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
गावांचे कोड त्यांच्या संबंधित जिल्हा आणि राज्याच्या नावांसह यादी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID

question:
ही क्वेरी भाषांतरित करा:
गाव कोडांची यादी त्यांच्या संबंधित जिल्हा आणि राज्यांच्या नावांसह, राज्यानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावून द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID ORDER BY T3.STATE_NAME

question:
ही विनंती भाषांतरित करा:
हिमाचल प्रदेश, उत्तर प्रदेश, मध्य प्रदेश, पंजाब आणि हरियाणा या राज्यांमधील विशिष्ट जिल्ह्यांसाठी—सोनीपत, हिसार, लुधियाना, सुलतानपूर आणि भोपाळ—गाव कोड प्रदान करा, राज्य आणि जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार संघटित करा.
sql: SELECT T1.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME IN ('Himachal Pradesh', 'Uttar Pradesh', 'Madhya Pradesh', 'Punjab', 'Haryana') AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('Sonipat', 'Hissar', 'Ludhiana', 'Sultanpur', 'Bhopal') GROUP BY T1.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME ORDER BY T3.STATE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: उत्तर प्रदेशच्या बाहेरील सर्व जिल्ह्यांसाठी अद्वितीय जिल्हा आयडीची यादी द्या.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME != 'Uttar Pradesh';

question: उत्तर प्रदेशच्या बाहेरील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची आयडी सूची करा ज्यात किमान एक पीएसयू गाव आहे, संख्यात्मक क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME != 'Uttar Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_ID ASC

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
उत्तर प्रदेश आणि हिमाचल प्रदेश या दोन्ही राज्यांमध्ये सामाईक असलेल्या गावांच्या कोड ओळखा.
sql: SELECT T1.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T1.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE IN ( SELECT T4.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T4 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T5 ON T4.DISTRICT_ID = T5.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T6 ON T5.STATE_ID = T6.STATE_ID WHERE T6.STATE_NAME = 'Himachal Pradesh' )

question: यूपी आणि हिमाचल प्रदेश या दोन्ही राज्यांमध्ये असलेल्या स्थानांशी संबंधित पीएसयू गाव कोड कोणते आहेत?
sql: SELECT T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME IN ('Uttar Pradesh', 'Himachal Pradesh') GROUP BY T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME) = 2

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
उत्तर प्रदेश आणि हिमाचल प्रदेश या दोन्ही राज्यांमध्ये असलेले पीएसयू गाव कोड ओळखा, जे चढत्या क्रमाने सूचीबद्ध आहेत.
sql: SELECT T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Uttar Pradesh' AND T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE IN (SELECT T3_sub.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_STATE AS T1_sub JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2_sub ON T1_sub.STATE_ID = T2_sub.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T3_sub ON T2_sub.DISTRICT_ID = T3_sub.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1_sub.STATE_NAME = 'Himachal Pradesh') GROUP BY T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE ORDER BY T3.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE ASC

question: सर्व जिल्ह्यांची यादी त्यांच्या संबंधित राज्यांच्या नावांसह प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID

question: राज्ये आणि त्यांच्या जिल्ह्यांची वर्णक्रमानुसार यादी द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
सर्व राज्ये आणि त्यांच्या जिल्ह्यांची यादी, राज्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमाने द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC

question:
या क्वेरीचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
राज्य क्रमांक १ मध्ये असलेल्या सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि क्रमांक सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT DISTRICT_NAME, DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT WHERE STATE_ID = 1;

question:
या क्वेरीचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
राज्य क्रमांक १ मधील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि क्रमांक त्यांच्या जिल्हा क्रमांकानुसार क्रमवारीत सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_ID, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID = 1 ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_ID

question: राज्य क्रमांक १ मधील सर्व जिल्हे त्यांच्या जिल्हा क्रमांकानुसार यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID = 1 GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_ID ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_ID ASC

question: प्रत्येक जिल्ह्यासाठी घरांची संख्या द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME

question: जिल्ह्यांची क्रमवारी त्यांच्या एकूण घरांच्या संख्येनुसार लावा, सर्वात जास्त लोकसंख्या असलेल्या जिल्ह्यापासून सुरुवात करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) DESC

question: एकापेक्षा जास्त घर असलेले जिल्हे त्यांच्या एकूण घरांच्या संख्येनुसार उच्च ते निम्न क्रमाने यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) DESC

question: सोनीपत जिल्ह्यातील सर्व घरगुती कुटुंबांसाठी मूळ घरगुती आयडी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Sonipat'

question: सोनीपत जिल्ह्यातील अद्वितीय घरगुती आयडीची क्रमवारीत यादी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Sonipat' GROUP BY T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL ORDER BY T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL

question: सोनीपत जिल्ह्यात स्थित सर्व घरगुती कुटुंबांची कुटुंब आयडी आणि त्यांची मूळ ओळखपत्रे यांची यादी कुटुंब आयडीनुसार क्रमवारीत प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Sonipat' GROUP BY T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL HAVING COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि त्यांचे संबंधित राज्य आयडी, जिल्ह्यानुसार वर्णक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT DISTRICT_NAME, STATE_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT ORDER BY DISTRICT_NAME;

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
सर्व जिल्हे आणि त्यांचे संबंधित राज्य आयडी यांची यादी, जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमाने द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.STATE_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: ज्या जिल्ह्यांमध्ये किमान एक नोंदणीकृत घर आहे अशा जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि राज्य आयडी यादी करा, जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.STATE_ID, COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.STATE_ID HAVING COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: कोणत्या दहा जिल्ह्यांमध्ये सर्वाधिक घरांची संख्या आहे?
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) DESC LIMIT 10

question: कोणत्या दहा जिल्ह्यांमध्ये सर्वाधिक घरांची संख्या आहे?
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) DESC LIMIT 10

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
सर्वाधिक घरांच्या संख्येच्या शीर्ष 10 जिल्ह्यांची ओळख करा, अशा कोणत्याही जिल्ह्यांचा समावेश न करता ज्यांचे घरांचे कोणतेही नोंदणीकृत आकडे नाहीत.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) AS household_count FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY household_count DESC LIMIT 10

question:
या क्वेरीचे भाषांतर करा:
घरांच्या आयडीची यादी त्यांच्या संबंधित जिल्ह्याच्या नावांसह आणि गाव कोडसह प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T3.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID

question:
हा क्वेरी भाषांतरित करा:
गाव कोडानुसार क्रमवारी लावून, त्यांच्या संबंधित गाव कोड आणि जिल्ह्याच्या नावांसह घरगुती आयडीची यादी द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL, T2.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE, T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID ORDER BY T2.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE

question:
ही विनंती भाषांतरित करा:
सोनीपत, हिसार आणि लुधियाना जिल्ह्यांमधील गाव १, ४ किंवा ५ मध्ये स्थित असलेल्या घरांची मूळ घर आयडी आणि गाव कोड, त्यांच्या गाव कोडानुसार क्रमवारी लावून द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL, T2.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE, T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('Sonipat', 'Hissar', 'Ludhiana') AND T2.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE IN ('4', '5', '1') GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL, T2.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE, T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T2.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE ASC

question: असे जिल्हे ओळखा ज्यात कोणतेही विभाजित कुटुंब नाहीत.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.SPLIT_HOUSEHOLD_ID = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
अनुपलब्ध गाव कोड असलेले क्षेत्र वगळून, अशा सर्व जिल्ह्यांची ओळख करा ज्यामध्ये कोणतेही विभाजित कुटुंब नाही.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID WHERE T2.PSU_VILLAGE_CODE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.SPLIT_HOUSEHOLD_ID = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
अशा जिल्ह्यांची ओळख करा ज्यात किमान एक प्राथमिक, न-विभाजित घरगुती आहे.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID WHERE T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL = '1' AND T3.SPLIT_HOUSEHOLD_ID = '1' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) >= 1

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे सूचीबद्ध करा ज्यात किमान एक प्राथमिक, नॉन-स्प्लिट घरकुटी आहे, वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID WHERE T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL = '1' AND T3.SPLIT_HOUSEHOLD_ID = '1' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME

question: मूळ कुटुंबे आणि विभाजित कुटुंबे दोन्ही असलेले सर्व जिल्हे ओळखा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID = T3.PSU_VILLAGE_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID_ORIGINAL = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T3.SPLIT_HOUSEHOLD_ID = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: सर्व अद्वितीय गाव आणि जिल्हा ओळखण्याच्या संयुक्त यादी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT PSU_VILLAGE_ID FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE UNION SELECT DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
जिल्ह्यानुसार संघटित केलेल्या गावांच्या आयडी आणि त्यांच्या संबंधित जिल्ह्यांच्या आयडीची यादी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID, T2.DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.PSU_VILLAGE_ID, T2.DISTRICT_ID ORDER BY T2.DISTRICT_ID;

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
सर्व गाव आयडी आणि जिल्ह्यांच्या आयडीची एकत्रित यादी प्रदान करा ज्यामध्ये किमान एक गाव आहे, संख्यानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT PSU_VILLAGE_ID FROM DIM_PSU_VILLAGE UNION SELECT T1.DISTRICT_ID FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_PSU_VILLAGE AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_ID HAVING COUNT(T2.PSU_VILLAGE_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY 1 ASC

question: प्रथम विवाहाचे वय नोंदवलेले नसलेल्या मातांसाठी, त्यांचे आयडी आणि प्रथम गौणा समारंभाची तारीख द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.DATE_OF_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN'

question: सर्व आईंच्या लग्नाचे वय आणि गौणा तारीख तपशील प्रदान करा ज्यांचे लग्न १८ व्या वर्षी झाले होते.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.DATE_OF_GAUNA_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = '18' ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED

question: १७ वर्षाच्या वयात लग्न झालेल्या आईंसाठी, त्यांचे आयडी, त्यांचे लग्नाचे अंदाजे वय आणि गौणा तारीख (सीएमसी स्वरूपात) प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.DATE_OF_GAUNA_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = '17' ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED

question: प्रथम विवाहाचे वय नोंदवलेले नसलेल्या आईंसाठी विवाह आणि गौणा कार्यक्रमाची माहिती द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.DATE_OF_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.DATE_OF_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED_CMC ORDER BY T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED DESC

question: प्रत्येक नोंदवलेल्या आईंच्या वयोगटासाठी, सरासरी लग्न आणि गौणा कार्यक्रम ओळखकर्ते काय आहेत?
sql: SELECT AVG(T2.MOTHER_MARRIAGE_ID), AVG(T3.MOTHER_GAUNA_ID), T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED

question: प्रत्येक नोंदवलेल्या मातांच्या वयोगटासाठी, विवाह आणि गौना घटना ओळखकर्त्यांची सरासरी काय आहे?
sql: SELECT AVG(T2.MOTHER_MARRIAGE_ID), AVG(T3.MOTHER_GAUNA_ID), T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED

question: ४५ आणि ४६ वर्षे वयाच्या मातांसाठी, अचूक नोंदवलेल्या लग्न आणि गौणा तारखांसह, वयानुसार गटबद्ध केलेले सरासरी लग्न आणि गौणा कार्यक्रम ओळखकर्ते दर्शवा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED, AVG(T2.MOTHER_MARRIAGE_ID), AVG(T3.MOTHER_GAUNA_ID) FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED IN ('46', '45') AND T2.DATE_OF_MARRIAGE_FLAG = 'Month and year' AND T3.DATE_OF_GAUNA_FLAG = 'Month and year' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED HAVING COUNT(T1.MOTHER_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED ASC

question: पहिल्या पाच मातांसाठी ज्यांचे लग्न १५ व्या वर्षी झाले, त्यांच्या आयडी आणि गौणा वेळी नोंदवलेली वय यादी करा, त्यांच्या आयडीनुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.MOTHER_ID < 5 AND T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = '15' ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID ASC

question:
ही विनंती भाषांतरित करा:
१५ वर्षांपूर्वी लग्न झालेल्या आणि ज्यांचा जन्म महिना आणि वर्ष निश्चित असलेल्या आईंची आयडी आणि गौणावरील गणना केलेली वये द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED < '15' AND T1.MOTHER_DATE_OF_BIRTH_FLAG = 'Month and year' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED HAVING COUNT(T1.MOTHER_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID ASC

question: मातांची आयडी, त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वयाची आणि गौणाची यादी द्या, लग्नाच्या वयानुसार जुन्या ते नवीन अशा क्रमाने मांडा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED DESC

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
विवाहाच्या वयानुसार जुन्या ते नवीन क्रमाने मातांची आयडी, त्यांचे विवाहाचे वय आणि गौणा यांची यादी द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED DESC

question: सर्व आईंच्या लग्न आणि गौणा वयांची माहिती द्या, जुन्या लग्न वयापासून ते नवीन लग्न वयापर्यंत क्रमवारी लावून.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED HAVING T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED DESC

question: गौना वेळी सर्वात तरुण असलेल्या दहा मातांची ओळख करा, त्यांच्या गौना आणि लग्नाच्या वयाची नोंद सुनिश्चित करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL AND T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED ASC LIMIT 10

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
त्यांच्या गौना वयाच्या वेळी सर्वात तरुण असलेल्या दहा आईंची ओळख करा, त्यांचे गौना आणि लग्नाचे वय नोंदवलेले असल्याची खात्री करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL AND T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED ASC LIMIT 10

question: पहिल्या दहा आईंची ओळख करा ज्यांचे गौणा वेळी वय १५ वर्षांपेक्षा जास्त होते, त्यांचे गौणा आणि लग्नाचे वय नोंदवलेले असल्याची खात्री करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL AND T3.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID HAVING MIN(T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED) > '15' ORDER BY MIN(T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED) ASC LIMIT 10

question: वयाच्या १८ वर्षांपूर्वी लग्न झालेल्या आईंच्या विवाहाचे आणि गौणाचे अंदाजित वय तुलना करा.
sql: SELECT T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED < '18';

question: वयाच्या १८ वर्षाखालील लग्न झालेल्या आईंच्या लग्नाच्या वेळच्या अंदाजित वयाची आणि गौणाच्या वेळच्या वयाची तुलना करा, त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वयानुसार क्रमवारी लावून.
sql: SELECT T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED < '18' ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED

question: नोंदीतील पहिल्या पाच आयांसाठी, ज्यांचे लग्नाचे वय आणि गौणाचे वय वेगळे आहे, अशा आयांची ओळख करून त्यांची आयडी तसेच दोन्ही वये लग्नाच्या वयानुसार जुन्यापासून ते नव्यापर्यंत क्रमवारीत दर्शवा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.MOTHER_ID < 5 GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED HAVING T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED <> T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED ORDER BY T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED DESC

question: ज्या आईंचे लग्न आणि गौना समारंभ दोन्ही वेळी त्यांचे वय अगदी 18 वर्ष होते, त्या आईंची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = '18' AND T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED = '18'

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वेळी आणि गौना समारंभाच्या वेळी अगदी 18 वर्षे वयाच्या असलेल्या सर्व आयांची ओळख करून द्या, त्यांच्या आयडीनुसार चढत्या क्रमाने सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = '18' AND T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED = '18' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.MOTHER_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID ASC

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
सर्व आईंची ओळख करा ज्यांनी त्यांच्या पहिल्या लग्नाची किंवा गौना समारंभाची वय माहिती नोंदवली आहे.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL OR T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL

question: मातांच्या पहिल्या लग्न किंवा गौना समारंभासाठी वयाची माहिती नोंदवलेल्या मातांच्या आयडींची क्रमवारीत यादी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL OR T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
त्यांच्या लग्न किंवा गौना समारंभासाठी वयाची माहिती नोंदवलेल्या सर्व आईंना त्यांच्या आयडीनुसार क्रमवारीत ओळखा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 LEFT JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID HAVING COUNT(T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED) > 0 OR COUNT(T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED) > 0 ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID ASC

question: मातांच्या पहिल्या लग्नाचे वय अज्ञात नोंदवलेले असल्यास, त्यांचे अंदाजित वय आणि पहिल्या लग्नाची तारीख द्या.
sql: SELECT AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, DATE_OF_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS WHERE AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN';

question: मातांच्या वयाची नोंद नसलेल्या पहिल्या लग्नाच्या तारखेसाठी आयडी आणि लग्नाच्या तारखांची यादी करा, घटनेच्या तारखेनुसार कालक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.DATE_OF_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN' ORDER BY T2.DATE_OF_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED_CMC

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
किमान एकदा प्रसूत झालेल्या पण ज्यांच्या पहिल्या लग्नाच्या वेळी वय अज्ञात आहे अशा आईंची आयडी, जन्मतारीख आणि पहिल्या लग्नाची तारीख प्रदान करा, त्यांच्या जन्मतारीखेनुसार सर्वात तरुण ते सर्वात वयस्कर या क्रमाने मांडा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.MOTHER_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T2.DATE_OF_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID INNER JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.MOTHER_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T2.DATE_OF_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED_CMC HAVING COUNT(T3.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC DESC

question: मातांच्या सध्याच्या नोंदवलेल्या वयानुसार गटबद्ध करून, लग्नाचे सरासरी वय आणि गौणाचे सरासरी वय यांचे विभाजन प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED, AVG(CAST(T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED AS NUMERIC)), AVG(CAST(T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED AS NUMERIC)) FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED;

question: प्रत्येक नोंदलेल्या आईच्या वयोगटासाठी, सरासरी लग्न आणि गौणा कार्यक्रम ओळखकर्ते काय आहेत?
sql: SELECT AVG(T2.MOTHER_MARRIAGE_ID), AVG(T3.MOTHER_GAUNA_ID), T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED

question: सध्या ४५ किंवा ४६ वर्षे वयाच्या आईंसाठी, ज्यांची जन्मतारीख महिना आणि वर्ष या दोन्हीने नोंदवलेली आहे, त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या सरासरी वयाची आणि गौणा (वास्तविक सहवास सुरू होण्याच्या) सरासरी वयाची तुलना करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED, AVG(CAST(T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED AS NUMERIC)), AVG(CAST(T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED AS NUMERIC)) FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.MOTHER_DATE_OF_BIRTH_FLAG = 'Month and year' AND T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED IN ('46', '45') GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED ASC

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वेळी किमान 18 वर्षे वयाच्या असलेल्या सर्व आईंची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS WHERE AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED >= '18';

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वेळी किमान 18 वर्षे वय असलेल्या आईंच्या आयडींची क्रमवारीत यादी द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED >= '18' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID ASC

question: अठरा वर्षांपेक्षा जास्त वयात लग्न केलेल्या आणि एकापेक्षा जास्त मुलांना जन्म दिलेल्या आईंची ओळख करा, त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वयानुसार मोठ्यापासून लहानापर्यंत क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED >= '18' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED HAVING COUNT(T3.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED DESC

question: प्रत्येक आईच्या पहिल्या लग्नाच्या आणि पहिल्या गौणाच्या अंदाजे वयांची तुलना द्या, लग्नाच्या वयानुसार सर्वात लहान ते सर्वात मोठ्या क्रमाने मांडा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED ASC

question: प्रत्येक आईसाठी अंदाजित पहिल्या लग्नाचे वय आणि पहिल्या गौणाचे वय यांची तुलना द्या, सर्वात लहान लग्नाच्या वयापासून सर्वात मोठ्या वयापर्यंत क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED ASC

question: विवाहाच्या वेळी पंधरा वर्षांपेक्षा जास्त वयाच्या आईंच्या विवाह आणि गौणा वयांची माहिती द्या, विवाहाच्या वयानुसार लहान ते मोठ्या क्रमाने मांडा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED HAVING T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED > '15' ORDER BY T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED ASC

question: सर्वात लहान वयात लग्न झालेल्या दहा आईंची आयडी आणि पहिल्या गौणाचे वय द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED ASC LIMIT 10

question: या दहा महिलांमध्ये ज्या सर्वात लहान वयात विवाहित झाल्या त्यांच्या आईची ओळख संख्या आणि गौणा वेळी त्यांचे अंदाजे वय ओळखा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED ASC LIMIT 10

question: पहिल्या दहा आजीच्या विवाह आणि गौणा वयाची माहिती देऊन त्यांच्या विवाह वयानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID, T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED HAVING MIN(T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED ASC LIMIT 10

question: मातांच्या वयाचा प्रोफाइल त्यांच्या पहिल्या लग्नाच्या वय आणि पहिल्या गौणाच्या वयासोबत प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
मातांच्या वयाची यादी त्यांच्या पहिल्या लग्नाच्या वय आणि पहिल्या गौणाच्या वयासह प्रदान करा, त्यांच्या सध्याच्या नोंदवलेल्या वयानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED

question: मातांच्या वयाची, त्यांच्या पहिल्या लग्नाच्या वयाची आणि पहिल्या गौणाच्या वयाची तपशीलवार माहिती तरुणातून जुन्या मातांच्या क्रमाने द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED, T2.AGE_AT_FIRST_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED, T3.AGE_AT_FIRST_GAUNA_IMPUTED ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_AGE_IMPUTED ASC

question: त्या आईंची ओळख करा ज्या त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वेळी आणि त्यांच्या गौना समारंभाच्या वेळी अगदी 18 वर्षांच्या होत्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = '18' AND T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED = '18'

question: त्या आईंची ओळख करा ज्या त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वेळी आणि त्यांच्या गौना समारंभाच्या वेळी अठरा वर्षांच्या होत्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = '18' AND T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED = '18';

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
त्या सर्व आईंची ओळख करा ज्या त्यांच्या लग्नाच्या वेळी आणि त्यांच्या गौना समारंभाच्या वेळी नक्की १८ वर्षांच्या होत्या.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED = '18' AND T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED = '18' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.MOTHER_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID ASC

question: १५ वर्षाच्या आधी लग्न केलेल्या किंवा गौना केलेल्या मातांची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED < '15' OR T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED < '15'

question: वयाच्या १५ वर्षांपूर्वी लग्न किंवा गौना झालेल्या सर्व आईंची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T1 JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID WHERE T1.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED < '15' OR T2.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED < '15' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
१५ वर्षांपूर्वी लग्न किंवा गौणा केलेल्या सर्व आईंची ओळख करा, त्यांच्या आयडीच्या चढत्या क्रमाने सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.AGE_AT_MARRIAGE_IMPUTED < '15' OR T3.AGE_AT_GAUNA_IMPUTED < '15' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID ASC

question: प्रतिसादकर्त्यासोबत सध्या राहत असलेल्या सर्व मुलांची जन्मतारीख आणि सध्याचे वय प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T2.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent';

question: प्रतिवादी सह सध्या राहणार्या सर्व मुलांच्या जन्मदिनांक आणि मृत्यू वयाची माहिती द्या, त्यांच्या जन्मदिनांकाच्या क्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावून.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T1.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' ORDER BY T1.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC

question: प्रतिसादकर्त्यासोबत सध्या राहणाऱ्या मुलांच्या जन्माच्या तपशिलासह, जन्मतारीख आणि मृत्यू वय यांचा समावेश करा, आणि ते नवीनतम जन्मतारीखांनुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID, T2.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID INNER JOIN DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T3 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T3.MOTHER_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' GROUP BY T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID, T2.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED ORDER BY T2.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC DESC

question: लिंगानुसार एकूण जन्मांची संख्या आणि सध्या प्रतिसादकर्त्यासोबत न राहणाऱ्या मुलांची संख्या यांचे विभाजन प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_SEX, COUNT(T2.BIRTH_EVENT_ID), SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID GROUP BY T1.CHILD_SEX

question: लिंगानुसार एकूण जन्मांची संख्या आणि सध्या प्रतिसादकाडे न राहणाऱ्या मुलांची संख्या यांचे विभाजन प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_SEX, COUNT(T0.BIRTH_EVENT_ID), SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT T0 JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS T1 ON T0.CHILD_ID = T1.CHILD_ID GROUP BY T1.CHILD_SEX ORDER BY T1.CHILD_SEX

question: एकूण जन्मांची संख्या आणि मृत्यूच्या वेळी मुलाचे वय अज्ञात असलेल्या प्रकरणांची संख्या, लिंगानुसार विभागणी करा, जन्म घटनांच्या सर्वाधिक वारंवारतेनुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_SEX, COUNT(T2.BIRTH_EVENT_ID), SUM(CASE WHEN T1.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SURVEY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_ID = T3.SURVEY_ID GROUP BY T1.CHILD_SEX HAVING COUNT(T2.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) DESC

question: प्रतिसादकर्त्यासोबत सध्या राहत असलेल्या सर्व मुलांच्या जन्म घटना आयडी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent';

question: प्रतिसादकर्त्यासोबत सध्या राहत असलेल्या मुलांच्या जन्म घटना आयडीची क्रमवारीत यादी प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' GROUP BY T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID ORDER BY T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID ASC

question: सर्वेक्षणात सहभागी झालेल्या व्यक्तींकडे राहणाऱ्या एकूण मुलांची संख्या लिंगानुसार वर्गीकृत करून, सर्वाधिक ते कमी संख्या या क्रमाने मांडा.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_SEX, COUNT(T2.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SURVEY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_ID = T3.SURVEY_ID WHERE T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' GROUP BY T1.CHILD_SEX HAVING COUNT(T2.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY COUNT(T2.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) DESC

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
मृत्यूचे वय अज्ञात असलेल्या मुलांचे संपूर्ण जन्म नोंदी आणि जनसांख्यिकीय तपशील त्यांच्या जन्माच्या शतक महिना कोड तारखेनुसार क्रमवारीत प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT * FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS ON FACT_BIRTH_EVENT.CHILD_ID = DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS.CHILD_ID WHERE DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN' ORDER BY DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC

question: मृत्यूचे वय अज्ञात म्हणून नोंदवलेल्या मुलांच्या जन्माच्या घटनेची संपूर्ण माहिती आणि लोकसंख्याशास्त्रीय प्रोफाइल्स पुरवा.
sql: SELECT * FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS ON FACT_BIRTH_EVENT.CHILD_ID = DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS.CHILD_ID WHERE DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN' ORDER BY DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
मृत्यूचे वय अज्ञात असे नोंदवलेल्या सर्व मुलांच्या जन्माच्या घटनेचा तपशील आणि जन्मतारीख द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID, T2.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SURVEY AS T3 ON T1.SURVEY_ID = T3.SURVEY_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN' GROUP BY T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID, T2.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED HAVING COUNT(T1.CHILD_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED DESC

question: प्रतिवाद्यासोबत सध्या राहणाऱ्या दहा सर्वात मोठ्या मुलांची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT CHILD_ID FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS WHERE CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' ORDER BY CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC ASC LIMIT 10

question: प्रतिवाद्यासोबत सध्या राहणाऱ्या दहा सर्वात मोठ्या मुलांची तपशील आणि जन्मतारीख यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_ID, T1.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' ORDER BY T1.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC ASC LIMIT 10

question: सर्वेक्षणाच्या नोंदींवर आधारित, प्रतिसादकांसह सध्या राहणार्या दहा सर्वात वयस्क मुलांच्या जन्मदिनांक आणि लिंगांची माहिती द्या.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T1.CHILD_SEX FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_ID = T3.SURVEY_ID WHERE T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' GROUP BY T1.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC, T1.CHILD_SEX HAVING MIN(T1.CHILD_ID) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_IMPUTED_CMC ASC LIMIT 10

question: जन्म घटनेची तपशील, मुलाचा लिंग आणि जीवित स्थिती, तसेच सर्व नोंदवलेल्या जन्मांसाठी अंदाजित मुलाखत तारीख प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT T1.BIRTH_EVENT_ID, T2.CHILD_SEX, T2.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS, T3.INTERVIEW_DATE_IMPUTED_CMC FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY AS T3 ON T1.SURVEY_ID = T3.SURVEY_ID;

question: मुलांचे लिंग आणि राहणीमान स्थिती प्रदान करा, त्यांच्या सर्वेक्षण मुलाखतींच्या तारखेनुसार क्रमवारी लावून.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_SEX, T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS, T3.INTERVIEW_DATE_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_ID = T3.SURVEY_ID ORDER BY T3.INTERVIEW_DATE_IMPUTED_CMC

question: जन्म घटनांमध्ये नोंदवलेल्या मुलांचे लिंग आणि जिवंत स्थिती प्रदान करा, त्यांच्या मुलाखतीच्या तारखांनुसार सुरुवातीला सर्वात अलीकडील तारखेपासून संघटित करा.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_SEX, T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS, T2.INTERVIEW_DATE_IMPUTED_CMC FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T3 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T3.CHILD_ID INNER JOIN DIM_SURVEY AS T2 ON T3.SURVEY_ID = T2.SURVEY_ID GROUP BY T1.CHILD_SEX, T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS, T2.INTERVIEW_DATE_IMPUTED_CMC HAVING COUNT(T3.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.INTERVIEW_DATE_IMPUTED_CMC DESC

question: ज्या मुलांसाठी जन्म घटनेची कोणतीही नोंद नोंदवलेली नाही, अशा सर्व मुलांची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_ID FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 LEFT JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_ID IS NULL

question: ज्या सर्व मुलांसाठी जन्म घटना नोंदणी केलेली नाही, त्यांची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_ID FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 LEFT JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_ID IS NULL

question: प्रतिवाद्यासह राहणाऱ्या अशा मुलांची ओळख करा ज्यांची जन्मतारीख अंदाजित आहे परंतु जन्म घटनेचा कोणताही नोंदणीकृत डेटा नाही.
sql: SELECT T1.CHILD_ID FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 LEFT JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_ID IS NULL AND T1.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' AND T1.CHILD_DATE_OF_BIRTH_FLAG = 'Age - year, month imputed';

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
सध्या त्यांच्यासोबत राहणाऱ्या मुलीच्या सर्व आईंची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T3 ON T2.CHILD_ID = T3.CHILD_ID WHERE T3.CHILD_SEX = 'Girl' AND T3.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID

question: अशा आईंची ओळख करा ज्यांची किमान एक मुलगी सध्या त्यांच्यासोबत राहत नाही.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_SEX = 'Girl' GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T2.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) > 0

question:
हा प्रश्न भाषांतरित करा:
त्यांच्या सोबत सध्या राहणारी किमान एक मुलगी आणि किमान एक मूल असलेल्या सर्व आईंना त्यांच्या आयडीनुसार क्रमवारीत ओळखा.
sql: SELECT T1.MOTHER_ID FROM DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.MOTHER_ID = T2.MOTHER_ID JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T3 ON T2.CHILD_ID = T3.CHILD_ID GROUP BY T1.MOTHER_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.CHILD_SEX = 'Girl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T3.CHILD_LIVING_STATUS = 'Living with respondent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.MOTHER_ID ASC

question: मृत्युवय अज्ञात आहे किंवा ज्यांच्या मृत्युवयाची अंदाजित स्थिती अज्ञात आहे असे सर्व मुलांची ओळख करा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT CHILD_ID FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS WHERE CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_FLAG = 'UNKNOWN' OR CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED = 'UNKNOWN';

question: मृत्युवय अज्ञात किंवा अंदाजित मूल्य म्हणून नोंदवलेल्या मुलांच्या अद्वितीय आयडीची यादी संख्यात्मक क्रमाने प्रदान करा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CHILD_ID FROM FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T1 JOIN DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID WHERE T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_FLAG = 'UNKNOWN' OR T2.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL ORDER BY T1.CHILD_ID

question:
या प्रश्नाचे मराठीत भाषांतर करा:
सर्व अशा मुलांची ओळख करा ज्यांचे मृत्यूवेळी वय अज्ञात किंवा अंदाजित आहे आणि सर्वेक्षण डेटामध्ये ज्यांचे किमान एक जन्म इव्हेंट नोंदवले गेले आहे.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.CHILD_ID FROM DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_BIRTH_EVENT AS T2 ON T1.CHILD_ID = T2.CHILD_ID JOIN DIM_SURVEY AS T3 ON T2.SURVEY_ID = T3.SURVEY_ID WHERE T1.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_FLAG = 'UNKNOWN' OR T1.CHILD_AGE_AT_DEATH_IMPUTED IS NOT NULL GROUP BY T1.CHILD_ID HAVING COUNT(T2.BIRTH_EVENT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.CHILD_ID ASC
